case_title: ARTHUR W. LEWIS VS. ARMANDO ISREAL SALGADO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-03-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ARTHUR W. LEWIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARMANDO ISREAL SALGADO IS NOT PRESENT, HOWEVER, ISRAEL T. SALGADO (SON) IS PRESENT AND INFORMS THE COURT THAT HE IS THE TRUE DEFENDANT IN THIS MATTER, BUT IS NOT PREPARED FOR HEARING TODAY. COURT AMENDS THE CLAIM TO INCLUDE ISRAEL T. SALGADO AS A DEFENDANT AND CONTINUES THE MATTER TO ALLOW HIM TIME TO PREPARE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED AUG-09-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SALGADO, ARMANDO ISREAL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,279.69 FILED BY LEWIS, ARTHUR W. AS TO DEFENDANT SALGADO, ARMANDO ISREAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ARTHUR W. LEWIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARMANDO ISREAL SALGADO IS NOT PRESENT AND IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT ISREAL T. SALGADO SON OF DEFENDANT WAS THE DRIVER OF THE VEHICLE AND SHOULD BE CORRECT NAMED DEFENDANT. ISREAL T. SALGADO IS ADDED AS NAMED DEFENDANT IN COURT AND IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, ARTHUR W. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SALGADO, ISREAL T. (PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
